title: Debating Remote Work
sentences: Ever since remote work became common, opinions about it have been divided.
Supporters claim that working from home boosts both focus and flexibility.
Critics, on the other hand, argue that it weakens teamwork and communication.
Having worked both remotely and in an office, I can see both sides.
While I appreciate the freedom of working from home, I sometimes miss chats.
My productivity tends to improve when I avoid a noisy commute.
Nevertheless, collaborating on complex projects feels easier in person.
Many companies are now experimenting with a mix of both approaches.
Whether this compromise works well depends largely on the team involved.
Ultimately, I doubt there is a single solution that suits every workplace.
